top-overlay.png.placement: Generated header sky with left branch, star, right cloud, and transparent scalloped bottom edge. Align to the top edge and scale by width only.

top-overlay@2x.png.placement: Retina version of top-overlay.png for srcset or image-set(). Display at 428 x 188 CSS px.

ready-bottom-overlay.png.placement: Absolute overlay aligned to the bottom edge of the Ready screen. Scale by width only; do not stretch vertically.

ready-bottom-overlay@2x.png.placement: Retina version of ready-bottom-overlay.png for srcset or image-set(). Display at 428 x 134 CSS px.

opening-hero.png.placement: Opening screen hero art, centered in normal content flow.

streaming-hero.png.placement: Bluetooth Streaming screen hero art, centered in normal content flow.

icon-song.png.placement: Ready screen Play song control icon. Centered transparent canvas.

icon-teddy.png.placement: Ready screen Animal sound control icon. Centered transparent canvas.

icon-stop.png.placement: Ready screen Stop control icon. Centered transparent canvas.

icon-pause-moon.png.placement: Pause mode panel illustration. Centered transparent canvas.

icon-theme.png.placement: Ready screen Theme control icon. Full uncropped book icon on a transparent canvas.
